Retrieve a paginated list of employee leave allowances with optional filters.

response.name: Successful response with list of allowances

description.content: Operations for retrieving organizational department information.
Retrieve a list of departments in the organization.

response.name: Successful response with list of departments

description.content: Operations for retrieving office location information.
Retrieve a list of office locations in the organization.

response.name: Successful response with list of locations

description.content: Operations for retrieving absence reason type definitions.
Retrieve a list of absence reason types defined in the organization (e.g., vacation, sick leave, parental leave).

response.name: Successful response with list of reason types

description.content: Operations for retrieving working time configurations.

response.name: Successful response with list of timespans

description.content: The Absence.io REST API allows integration with absence management features. With this API, users can retrieve, create, update, and delete information related to employee absences, allowances, users, departments, locations, and reason types. All requests and responses use JSON format. Authentication uses the Hawk authentication scheme with an API key generated from the Absence.io account settings under Integrations.
